title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Tata Motors

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Tata Motors
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Tata Motors in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tata Motors:
Tata Motors is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Motors!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
